_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: CN Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: CN Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

resident ID numbers shall not be collected (only salted verification hashes retained)

Mr. Ning Hao (DOB 1991-11-08, age 34), Head of Device Security at Target (Nanshan District, Shenzhen), to execute a 36‑month service and non-compete agreement; internal device ID GL‑SZ‑NH‑007, enterprise email ning.hao@guangling-mp.cn, payroll account code GLMP‑HR‑4462, and VPN session reference SID‑2026‑06‑05‑GLMP‑NH01 are recorded for access control and audit

closing conditional upon SAMR clearance or no-filing confirmation
closing adjustments tied to audited FY2025 net profit

Structure & Consideration: Investor to acquire 35% of Target’s enlarged share capital via mixed primary/secondary issuance for a total consideration of RMB 280,000,000; implied pre-money valuation RMB 520,000,000; closing adjustments tied to audited FY2025 net profit.
PRC Merger Control: SAMR anti-monopoly filing to be made if turnover thresholds are triggered; closing conditional upon SAMR clearance or no-filing confirmation.

Operational Integration: Post-closing, Investor to nominate 2 directors and 1 supervisor; R&D center expansion in Nanshan to be funded from primary proceeds; no transfer of source code repositories to third countries without updated data impact assessment and CAC-compliant measures.
